task: Advanced high-value task: Flow Cytometry Gating Reproducibility High-Severity Case Digest. Scenario: a high-value system is approaching an engineering gate and the owner needs a defensible go/no-go packet for flow cytometry gating reproducibility. Embedded packet: Records: R1 gate_range_pct=34 viability_pct=56 analyst_count=1; R2 gate_range_pct=43 viability_pct=52 analyst_count=4; R3 gate_range_pct=29 viability_pct=67 analyst_count=0. Remediation options: O1 changes gate_range_pct by -12% cost=74000; O2 changes viability_pct by -18% cost=92800; O3 changes analyst_count by -25% cost=53200; max_budget=117600. Rules and constraints: gate range>5 points needs harmonization; viability<80 flags sample quality; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: write a specialist-facing memo that distinguishes calculation results, assumptions, missing inputs, and expert-review questions. Deliver flow_gating_1.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
